name: instagram-lead-engine-root
description: Root workspace for Instagram Lead Engine

scripts.collect: cd agents/collector && npm run collect -- && npm run backup -- --upload
scripts.send: cd agents/outreach && npm run send -- && npm run backup -- --upload
scripts.reply: cd agents/dmresponder && npm run reply -- && npm run backup -- --upload
scripts.reply:auto: cd agents/dmresponder && npm run cron -- --show-browser && npm run backup -- --upload

author: Louis
